name: DEERE & CO
summary: Deere & Company (John Deere), incorporated in Delaware in 1958, manufactures and finances agricultural, turf, and construction equipment. Products include row crop tractors, harvesters, cotton pickers, sugarcane equipment, tillage and seeding equipment, riding lawn equipment, excavators, crawler dozers, and forestry machinery. Its Financial Services segment provides retail notes, leases, revolving charge accounts, wholesale receivables, and extended warranties. The company operates through four segments: Production & Precision Agriculture, Small Agriculture & Turf, Construction & Forestry, and Financial Services.
